import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut i = 0
let n = words.len()
while i < n
  let w = match words.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let wl = string.len(w)
  if wl > best_len
    best = w
    best_len = wl
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("longest=#{best}")
